topic: My downstairs neighbor sweeps his floor every night at two thirty AM and his apartment has been empty for nine months
title: My Downstairs Neighbor Sweeps Every Night at 2:30 AM. He Has Been Gone Nine Months. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My downstairs neighbor sweeps every night at two thirty AM. He has been gone nine months.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a small apartment hallway at night with hardwood floor visible, a broom leaning against a wall, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Six unit walk up. I live above 1B. Hardwood floors throughout the building.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a small brick walk up apartment building at dusk, six numbered units, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I am a light sleeper. I hear everything.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a bedside alarm clock showing two thirty AM in red numerals, dim ambient bedroom light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: First sweep in March. Bristles on wood. Steady rhythm.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of bristles of a broom on a wooden floor, dim ambient light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Knocked on his door the next morning. No answer.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a knuckle rapping on an apartment door, only the hand visible, dim hallway light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Building manager said the unit had been vacant since June. Last year.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an apartment building manager at a small office desk seen from behind, no face visible, dim afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Set my phone to record overnight.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a smartphone propped on a bedside table with a recording app open, dim moonlight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Two thirty AM. Sweeping for thirty minutes. Same direction. Same rhythm. Then silence.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen showing audio waveforms in a recording app, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Building manager opened 1B with me. Hardwood floor swept clean. A pile of dust in the center.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of an empty apartment with bare wooden floors and a small pile of dust in the center of the room, dim natural light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The pile contained things I have lost in my apartment over the past nine months.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a pile of small lost objects swept together on a hardwood floor, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Keys. Earrings. A photograph from my refrigerator.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a single small photograph beside a set of house keys and earrings on a bare wood floor, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The sweeping continued the next night.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a broom leaning against an empty apartment wall, dim night light through a window, no people, vertical 9:16 framing
